common.errorLoadingProducts: An error occurred while loading products.
common.emptyCatalogHint: There are no published tours on this site yet. Please check back later.
common.pickupTimeNotice: Up to 48 hours before the tour departure, we continue to accept other reservations, which means additional hotels may be added. Therefore, we cannot confirm the departure time until then. 48 hours before the tour departure, we close all pickup location requests from all participants, finalize the exact pickup times, and send pickup schedule notifications to customers.
common.pickupTimeApproximate: ※ The time shown above is approximate. The exact pickup time will be confirmed and notified 48 hours before the tour departure.
common.pickupHotelNotSelected: If you do not select your preferred pickup hotel by 48 hours before the tour departure, you will need to come directly to one of the hotels scheduled for that day.
common.allPickupTimeNotice: Pickup times for other hotels are subject to change. Up to 48 hours before the tour departure, additional reservations may be added, so exact times may not be confirmed.
common.recruitingNotice: This tour is currently recruiting participants. The departure will be confirmed once the minimum number of participants is reached.
common.simulationUserNoReservations: No reservation information available for the simulated user.
common.noToursReserved: No tours have been reserved yet.
common.heroSubtitle2: Create memories that will last a lifetime

common.findToursByCategoryDesc: Select a category of interest to find customized tours
common.professionalGuideDesc: Experienced professional guides help you with safe and fun travels
common.customizedServiceDesc: We provide personalized tour experiences tailored to customer requirements
common.safetyGuaranteedDesc: All tours include insurance so you can travel safely
common.support24_7Desc: We provide customer support services available anytime
common.popularToursDesc: Meet the best tours that customers choose most
common.tagsPageSubtitle: Find tours by the categories you care about

common.whyChooseUsDesc: We provide the best travel experience with our unique services
common.contactUs: Please contact us anytime if you have any questions
common.guestReviewsDesc: Real stories from travelers around the world
common.reviewGuest1Quote: Our guide was amazing and the itinerary was perfect. Highly recommend for families!
common.reviewGuest2Quote: The Grand Canyon sunrise tour was a once-in-a-lifetime experience.
common.reviewGuest3Quote: Everything from pickup to drop-off was smooth and well organized.
common.faqA1: Most tours include pickup from the Las Vegas Strip and major hotels. Check each tour page for details.
common.faqA2: Policies vary by tour. Free cancellation options are shown on the tour detail page.
common.faqA3: Many tours are family-friendly. Age restrictions are listed on each product page.
common.faqA4: Inclusions vary by tour. Always review what is included near the price.
common.faqA5: We offer Korean and English guided tours. Language is noted in the tour description.
common.videoSectionDesc: Watch highlights and get a feel for the experience
common.newsletterDesc: Subscribe for new tours and exclusive offers
common.promoDesc: Popular dates sell out fast. Secure your spot today.
common.richTextBody: Based in Las Vegas, we explore the American Southwest — Grand Canyon, Antelope Canyon, and more — with expert guides, small groups, hotel pickup, and transparent pricing.

dynamicPricingPage.includedExcludedHint: You can view and edit the included/excluded details from the channel settings.
dynamicPricingPage.dateRangeModalDescription: Choose the date range and weekdays to apply.
dynamicPricingPage.basePriceEditHint: You can change the base price on the product edit page.
dynamicPricingPage.noRulesToSave: No price rules to save. Please enter price information.
dynamicPricingPage.batchSaveFailed: Batch save failed. Trying individual save...
dynamicPricingPage.confirmDeleteDates: Delete price rules for {count} selected date(s) ({dates})?
dynamicPricingPage.couponTooltip: Customer pay & Net Price recalc with this discount
dynamicPricingPage.ctrlClickDateHint: Ctrl (Mac: ⌘)+click to add or remove individual dates.
dynamicPricingPage.doubleClickHint: Double-click a date to toggle sale/closed
dynamicPricingPage.choiceCalendarHint: Select a choice to see its calendar
dynamicPricingPage.noRowsHint: No rows. Click "Add row" to add.
dynamicPricingPage.realtimeCalcHint: Enter prices to see calculated results.
dynamicPricingPage.singlePriceModeDesc: One unified price for all ages
dynamicPricingPage.commissionOnSaleOnly: Commission & coupon on sale price only
dynamicPricingPage.commissionOnSaleOnlyDesc: Commission/coupon apply to base sale price only
dynamicPricingPage.commissionOnTotalDesc2: Same rate applied to all price components
dynamicPricingPage.notIncludedAmountOnlyDesc: Only the set not-included amount is balance
dynamicPricingPage.otaFormulaBaseOnly: Base price only (choice excluded, 20% off excluded, coupon excluded) / (1 - {percent}%) = OTA sale price
dynamicPricingPage.otaFormulaFull: Max sale × 0.8 (20% off) / (1 - {coupon}% coupon) / (1 - {commission}% commission) = OTA sale price
dynamicPricingPage.otaChoiceExcludedNote: Choice price and not-included amount are excluded from OTA sale calculation and handled as balance.
dynamicPricingPage.commissionOnSaleOnlyNote: Choice price and not-included amount are excluded from commission/coupon and handled as balance.
dynamicPricingPage.commissionExample: e.g. Sale ($140) + Choice ($75) + Not included ($15) = $230 total. Commission 10% = $14 (on $140 only). Net = ($140 - $14) + $75 + $15 = $216. Balance = $75 + $15 = $90
dynamicPricingPage.notIncludedAmountOnlyDesc2: Not-included amount is excluded from commission and handled as balance. Collected in cash after tour.
dynamicPricingPage.notIncludedAndChoiceDesc2: Not-included amount + choice price are excluded from commission. Sum is handled as balance and collected in cash after tour.
dynamicPricingPage.notIncludedNoneDesc: No not-included amount set. All amounts are paid online.
dynamicPricingPage.allAgesSamePrice: One unified price for all ages.
dynamicPricingPage.channelBasePriceEditableHint: Enter the base price for this channel and date range. It will be combined with per-choice unit surcharges/discounts.
dynamicPricingPage.choiceUnitPriceHint: Enter a unit price for each option in a choice group (e.g. US resident, Lower Antelope, room). On save, combination prices are calculated as the sum of selected options.
dynamicPricingPage.choicePricingModeAbsoluteHint: Enter the final sale price for each choice combination.
dynamicPricingPage.choicePricingModeBasePlusHint: Final price = channel base + choice surcharge or discount.
dynamicPricingPage.costPriceNote: Same cost price applies to Adult/Child/Infant.
dynamicPricingPage.notIncludedZeroHint: Setting to 0 will clear the not-included amount.

audit.label: Reviewed

audit.hideAuditedTitle: Hide bookings that have been marked as reviewed.

ticketBooking.useSupplierTicketDesc: If checked, you can select a registered supplier's ticket. Price and entry time are automatically set.
ticketBooking.submitterEmailAuto: Logged-in user email is saved automatically.
ticketBooking.zelleConfirmationHint: If paid with Zelle, enter the confirmation number from the app or bank.
ticketBooking.selectTourHelpText: Only tours whose calendar span (start date through end date / end datetime) includes the check-in date are listed. You may leave it blank if the tour is not created yet.
ticketBooking.enterCheckInToLoadTours: Enter check-in date to load tours.
ticketBooking.noToursInCheckInWindow: No tours include this check-in date in their schedule.
ticketBooking.enterCheckInToLoadReservations: Enter check-in date to load reservations.
ticketBooking.noReservationsForCheckInDate: No reservations for this check-in date (tour_date).
ticketBooking.selectReservationHelpText: Only reservations whose tour date matches the check-in date are listed. If the reservation does not exist yet, leave blank and save.
ticketBooking.selectReservationDisabledWhenTour: Reservation link cannot be changed while a tour is selected.
ticketBooking.dragOrClickFiles: Drag and drop files or click to select
ticketBooking.supportedFormats: Supported formats: JPG, PNG, GIF, PDF, DOC, DOCX (max 10MB)
ticketBooking.deleteRequestConfirm: Delete from the list? It will be hidden until a super admin permanently removes it.
ticketBooking.deleteRequestedWaiting: Deletion requested (waiting for Super to delete)
ticketBooking.deleteExpenseArchiveConfirm: Move this ticket expense to the deleted vault? You can restore it later; statement links will be removed.
ticketBooking.bulkAddHint: Creates one booking per calendar day from start through end with the same time, quantity, and cost.
ticketBooking.bulkAddError: Bulk add failed. Please try again.
ticketBooking.bulkAddSubmitterRequired: Submitter email is required. Check that you are signed in.
ticketBooking.bulkAddDatesRequired: Please select both start and end dates.
ticketBooking.bulkAddInvalidRange: Invalid date range (start must be on or before end).
ticketBooking.vendorEmailBlockHint: Preview HTML (card) or Text (lines), then copy. The Text tab also pastes bold red for changed values.
ticketBooking.vendorEmailTextRichHint: Text copy keeps bold red on changed values when pasted into a rich email client.
ticketBooking.vendorEmailSendAndSaveHint: Sends the HTML email to the vendor via Resend, then saves the booking request. From & CC: vegasmaniatour@gmail.com

tourHotelBooking.selectTourHelpText: Only tours whose calendar span (start date through end date / end datetime) includes the check-in date are listed. You may leave it blank if the tour is not created yet.
tourHotelBooking.enterCheckInToLoadTours: Enter check-in date to load tours.
tourHotelBooking.noToursInCheckInWindow: No tours include this check-in date in their schedule.

info.title: Booking Management Guide
items: Real reservations must be completed by paying suppliers 2 days before the tour.
Check and update booking records regularly as tour participants may change.
All changes are automatically recorded in history and can be checked anytime.
Please update the status when changing from tentative to real reservation.

calendar.ticketDeletedBookingsViewTitle: Ticket bookings hidden from the list (deletion requested)
calendar.ticketDeletedBookingsViewDescSuper: Super: select rows, then permanently delete.
calendar.ticketDeletedBookingsViewDescReadOnly: These do not appear on the main list. Only a super admin can permanently delete them.
calendar.ticketNeedCheckButtonTitle: Ticket bookings to review (no tour · cancel due passed)
calendar.ticketNeedCheckHint: Use the tabs to filter, then open a row to edit.
calendar.ticketNeedCheckEmptyNoTourSub: No unlinked bookings in this date range.
calendar.ticketNeedCheckEmptyNoTour: No non-cancelled ticket bookings without a linked tour.
calendar.ticketNeedCheckEmptyCancelDue: No bookings where cancel due is before today and check-in is after today.
calendar.ticketTableStatusDisplaySummaryHint: Legacy summary badge is primary; use the info icon tooltip for all six axes.
calendar.ticketTableStatusDisplayAxisSummaryHint: Shows booking, vendor, change, payment, refund, and operations in the table. Use the summary badge below for quick legacy changes.
calendar.ticketTableStatusThHintSummary: Summary mode: legacy status badge is the main display.
calendar.ticketTableStatusThHintAxis: Axis mode: six-axis values are shown in this column.
calendar.noBookingsFound: No bookings found matching the search criteria
calendar.ticketStatusExplainSixAxisIntro: Ticket bookings are tracked on six axes: booking, vendor, change, payment, refund, and operations. Each axis can move independently. The list “Status” column is a summary label; use the row info icon or detail view to see per-axis values.
calendar.ticketStatusDiagramConnector: May occur between pending and confirmed

ticketStatusStepHint.tentative: Hold only — not yet paid or ticketed.
ticketStatusStepHint.pending: Waiting on supplier, slot, or internal confirmation.
ticketStatusStepHint.confirmed: Confirmed; ticket cost has been paid.

calendar.ticketCalendarTourColorsLegendHint: Tour chip colors match products in the legend above.
calendar.ticketCalendarHeadcountMismatchHint: Red outline: sum of participants on tours that start this day ≠ sum of ticket qty (excl. cancelled) for check-ins this day. Days that only continue a multi-day tour from a previous day are not compared.
calendar.hotelLegendDescription:
• Labels show hotel name, room type (count), and tour product name
• Multi-night reservations are displayed from check-in to day before check-out
• Hover to see detailed information (including dates)

ticketBookingActions.axesEditorHint: Saving updates all six axes and realigns the legacy summary status.
ticketBookingActions.modalOptionalHint: Fill only what you need. Leaving fields empty matches the previous "skip" behavior on the server.
ticketBookingActions.datetimeLocalHint: Uses your browser’s date/time picker; stored as UTC (ISO 8601).
ticketBookingActions.invalidAmount: Enter a valid number for the amount (e.g. 120 or 99.5).
ticketBookingActions.invalidDatetime: Check the date and time you entered.

productDetail.sunrisePickupDifferentDateTitle: Tour date and hotel pickup date are different
productDetail.sunrisePickupDifferentDateBody: This sunrise tour is timed around sunrise at the Grand Canyon South Rim. The tour date you selected is the calendar day of that sunrise—not when hotel pickup begins. Pickup often happens the previous evening so we can reach the rim in time.
productDetail.sunriseApproxNote: monthly reference until live data updates
productDetail.sunriseScheduleLoading: Updating schedule times for your selected date…
productDetail.previousDayPickupReason: Sunrise tours require an early-morning arrival at the Grand Canyon. Hotel pickup is scheduled the evening before your tour date so we can reach the rim before sunrise.

bookingConfirmation.successBody: Thank you. Your payment was successful and your reservation has been received. It is currently pending and will be confirmed after our review. A receipt has been sent to your email.

customerSiteFooter.brandDescription: Premium Las Vegas–based tours to the Grand Canyon, Antelope Canyon, and the American Southwest with licensed local guides.

customerDashboard.otaHintBody: Enter phone, email (including OTA temporary email), tour date, or product name. After linking, you can view reservations and chat from this account.

customerProfile.residentStatusHint: Please select your resident status. If you select "Non-Resident with Pass", please upload your pass and ID photos below.

passUpload.title: Pass & ID Photo Upload

passUpload.privacyNotice: Uploaded information will be deleted after tour completion in accordance with our privacy policy.

passUpload.idPhotoNotice: Note: Please upload showing only your name and photo. You may cover other personal information (address, SSN, etc.).
passUpload.imageOnly: Only image files are allowed. (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP)

passUpload.bothPhotosRequired: Please upload both pass photo and ID photo.

residentCheck.npsBody: Starting Jan 1, 2026, certain national parks may charge non-U.S. residents (16+) an additional entry fee. U.S. residents pay the standard fee.
residentCheck.hasAnnualPass: I have an America the Beautiful Annual Pass

residentCheck.npsAddonHint: Additional park entry fee for non-U.S. residents ages 16 and older.
residentCheck.cardFeeHint: Applies only when paying by credit card.

residentCheck.subtitle: Complete residency confirmation, uploads, and payment using your personal email link.
residentCheck.securePageNote: Confirm residency, upload an Annual Pass photo if applicable, upload ID/proof, agree to the terms, and pay any balance by card if you choose card payment.

publicChat.pwaIosSafari: Tap the Share button (⬆️) in Safari and select "Add to Home Screen".
publicChat.pwaAndroidChrome: Open Chrome menu (⋮) and select "Add to Home Screen" or "Install App".
publicChat.pwaManualInstructions:
Open your browser menu (⋮ or ⚙️) and look for:

• "Add to Home Screen"
• "Install App"

Or click the install icon on the right side of the address bar.
publicChat.pwaInstallFailed: Cannot show install prompt. Please install from your browser menu.
publicChat.nameMinLength: Please enter a name with at least 2 characters.
publicChat.pushEnabled: Push notifications enabled. You will receive notifications when new messages arrive.

publicChat.name: Name
publicChat.usageGuide1: Feel free to ask about pickup times, locations, or any other questions.
publicChat.usageGuide2: You can communicate in real-time with your guide about special requests or questions during the tour.
publicChat.usageGuide3: Please wait a moment for your guide to respond.
publicChat.usageGuide4: The chat room will remain available for a certain period after the tour ends.
publicChat.unableToLoadRoom: Unable to load chat room information.

publicChatTutorial.step0Row1: Use this page to message your guide and staff in real time.
publicChatTutorial.step0Row2: The next steps use the same icons and badge styles you will see in the app.
publicChatTutorial.step1Download: Download: Add this chat to your home screen to use it like an app.
publicChatTutorial.step1Manual: Book icon (Guide): Open this tutorial again anytime.
publicChatTutorial.step1Bell: Bell: Turn push notifications on or off (browser permission required).
publicChatTutorial.step1Flag: Flag: Switch display language between Korean and English.
publicChatTutorial.step1Menu: Menu (mobile): Expand or collapse the chat toolbar.
publicChatTutorial.step2DemoCaption: Next to the room title (same badge style)
publicChatTutorial.step2BadgeHint: The blue pill shows how many messages are in this room.
publicChatTutorial.step2Phone: Phone (green): Start a voice call when your guide is available.
publicChatTutorial.step2CopyShare: Copy · Share: Copy or share this chat link.
publicChatTutorial.step2Chevron: Chevron (gray): On mobile, expand the folded toolbar.
publicChatTutorial.step2WideScreenNote: On large screens the same actions may appear as a compact colored row; bell and language may only show on the right inside the chat header.
publicChatTutorial.step3Messages: Messages are listed in chronological order.
publicChatTutorial.step3Scroll: Scroll up to read older messages.
publicChatTutorial.step4Image: Image: Upload and send a photo.
publicChatTutorial.step4Location: Location pin: Share your current location on a map.
publicChatTutorial.step4Send: Type in the field and tap the blue Send button (or press Enter).
